description_long: This kiosk features a modern, open booth design with a combination of bold blue and orange structural elements. The main structure forms an L-shape, with a large blue wall at the back and side, and an orange vertical support on one end. A white canopy with the text 'Online Expo' in black letters extends over a central seating area, which includes a dark brown table and four white chairs. The front of the kiosk has a reception counter with the 'e-Man' logo, and the back wall displays additional branding and contact information. The flooring appears to be a light wood or laminate, providing a clean and inviting base. The overall look is sleek and professional, suitable for trade shows or urban promotional events.
description: A modern, open-sided kiosk with blue and orange walls, a white canopy labeled 'Online Expo', a reception counter, and a central seating area with a table and chairs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the reception counter with 'e-Man' branding, seating area, and prominent blue and orange walls.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the open canopy with 'Online Expo' signage and the arrangement of the table and chairs inside.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the solid blue wall, with minimal visible features except the structure's mass.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the open layout, canopy, and seating arrangement beneath the roof.
attribute_signage_type: Printed and logo signage; 'Online Expo' in large black letters above the entrance canopy, 'e-Man' logo and contact info on the front counter and back wall.
attribute_door_configuration: Single open archway at the front, no physical doors.
attribute_roof_design: Flat white canopy roof with overhang, supported by blue and orange structural elements, no skylights or decorative features.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with bold color blocking and open-plan layout.
